user.title: Volter Energy
user.description: Enter the API key from your Volter app (Settings > API Key).

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Volter API. Check your internet connection.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Generate a new key in the Volter app.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.

init.title: Monitoring — Required entities
init.description: Map your inverter entities to Volter monitoring. These are required for energy optimization.

monitoring_extended.title: Monitoring — Optional entities
monitoring_extended.description: Additional entities for improved optimization accuracy.

control.title: Control — Inverter commands
control.description: Map inverter control entities to enable remote commands from the Volter app. All fields are optional.
